description: public_key_der() uses SubjectPublicKeyInfo::try_from(Public) from tss-esapi's abstraction layer, then serializes with picky_asn1_der::to_vec(). This produces correct SPKI DER output. The tss-esapi TryFrom impl handles RSA and ECC P-256 correctly (proper OID, uncompressed EC point format 0x04||x||y, RSA modulus with exponent). The trait contract requires SPKI DER, and this path produces exactly that. Note: tss-esapi has an upstream bug where NistP224 maps to secp256r1 OID, but that does not affect this crate which only uses P-256.
title: SPKI DER conversion via picky-asn1-x509 is correct
